MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evan Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies, Inc is present. Represented by Ryan Markiet.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chris Le is present.
Attorney Barbara Lam appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of DEC-12-2016 is vacated. (501)
